title: Advanced Night Vision Goggles
description: Night vision goggles with Curios support. 2 Models and a On/off function
body:
# Advanced!
Adds Night Vision Goggles for Curios. Perfect to use with Timeless and Classic Guns.


There is a PNVG19, PVS115  

# Recipe
Look at the Screenshots


# Dependencies

1.18.2+ Curios!

# Licensing
You are only allowed to use it in your Modpack if you share it through Curseforge. I do not allow reupload of my mod!
If you use my mod in a Video/Stream/Server please tell me so i can look at your Feedback!  


**Do you have Suggestions, need Help or just want to say Thanks?**  
**Come visit my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/9V8cA3sZ5s)**
